title: Universal Rubber Head Clamps 3 Inch Secure Lever Lock Metal Body Outdoor
description:
Need to hold something down or in place? These 3" Locking Rubber C clamps have a pivot lever locking mechanism that is easy to use and guarantees that materials being secured will stay that way. Designed to be a ceiling clamp, to help easily adjust supports and leveling lines, we've found that they are great at much more than that and have used them for holding down tarps and pieces of sheet metal together and much more! Universal Rubber Head Clamp easily clamp and release mechanism allows for fast and easy positioning while the convenient thumb lock is designed to be comfortable and help reduce hand fatigue and cramping when positioning many locking clamps across a project grid at once. Perfect for all your securing needs

Universal Rubber Head Clamps 3 Inch Secure Lever Lock Metal Body Outdoor

Need to hold something down or in place?

Key Features

  • SECURE LOCKING - Secure pivoting lever lock secures in place and stays that way
  • METAL BODY - Metal body construction is lightweight and designed to last
  • SAFE RUBBER HEAD - Rubber head clamp is durable and safe, reliably staying locked while avoiding damage to secured surfaces
  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL DESIGN - Ideal of home or outdoor use, camping, locking down tarps, or securing sheet metal
  • PRODUCT DETAILS - Length: 3", Weight: .25 lbs.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: RBH3-563
  • UPC: 761199967214
  • Color: Silver

These 3" Locking Rubber C clamps have a pivot lever locking mechanism that is easy to use and guarantees that materials being secured will stay that way. Designed to be a ceiling clamp, to help easily adjust supports and leveling lines, we've found that they are great at much more than that and have used them for holding down tarps and pieces of sheet metal together and much more!

Universal Rubber Head Clamp easily clamp and release mechanism allows for fast and easy positioning while the convenient thumb lock is designed to be comfortable and help reduce hand fatigue and cramping when positioning many locking clamps across a project grid at once. Perfect for all your securing needs. Galvanized steel construction makes this ideal for outdoor applications while being weatherproof and easily cleaned for many reuses; don't dispose, reuse.

The soft rubber clamp tips will maintain the proper clamp position and protect the clamping surface. Rubber head clamps are durable and reliable, while also giving you peace of mind that the surface being secured won't be damaged. The metal body design is lightweight and simple.
